rationale: The only direct evidence is a single DOI-level match (reference_index 21) with no in-text citation context or reference text, so we cannot tell how substantively it is used. The topics are plausibly related—both notes discuss social influence for marketing interventions (the citing paper’s behavior-based targeting/social spillovers and the cited paper’s WOM seeding/targeting value decomposition)—but that alone is insufficient to confirm importance.
